name: Midwest Food & Beverage Distributors
description: Midwest FBD is a primary B2B distributor of specialty beverages, craft beers, and gourmet food products to independent retailers and supermarkets across 8 Midwestern states.

name: Summit Hardware Supply
description: Summit Hardware Supply is a large-scale distributor of tools, safety gear, and industrial equipment supplying hardware stores, construction sites, and manufacturing plants nationwide.

name: Vanguard Apparel Importers
description: B2B importer and master distributor of sustainable activewear and athleisure garments, serving boutique retail brands and department stores in North America.
